notes: ATO 2023-24 Corporate Report tax fields retained. Chevron Australia Holdings Pty Ltd Tax Transparency Report, year ended 31 December 2024, states audited Annual Report extract profit before income tax expense of US$7,056.593m and total income tax expense of US$1,863.014m; net profit field is their difference. ATO tax year and company reporting period do not match exactly.
citation: Chevron Australia Holdings Pty Ltd Tax Transparency Report, year ended 31 December 2024.

fields.net_profit_basis: profit after tax derived from stated audited Annual Report extract: profit before income tax expense US$7,056.593m less total income tax expense US$1,863.014m
